dashboard.label: Forensic Command Center — Find Evil
dashboard.description: Forensic overview of the compromised Windows Server 2016 DC (SRL-2018) — verdict, KPIs, severity, MITRE kill-chain and LOLBins, rendered as native @splunk/react-ui controls via A2UI.

html.div: 🔴 Forensic Command Center — powered by YARA-X + Volatility3, agent-queryable through the Splunk MCP Server. A2UI summary rendered as @splunk/react-ui components.
